text: Passing through the corridor, I sense an anticipation in the stillness—a feeling of poised functionality, as if this space is waiting for ideas and people to activate its purpose. The next room, with its bold R+D, immediately catches my philosophical curiosity. The juxtaposition of sterile glass with the vibrant, intellectual energy of the display inside fills me with a quiet awe. Here, innovation and inquiry are not just presented but celebrated. I feel inspired, as if I am on the threshold of discovery.
